titleStmt.title: SII 20.169: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 169. (B.K. No. 90 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone in the temple of Sōmēśvara.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's rengal year 4, Śōbhakṛit, Vais11ākha, ba. 1, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1183, April 10, Sunday. The month given was adhika-māsa.
The inscription records the death of Bammuga, a servant of Chaladaṁka-rāma Mādaṇa-seṭṭi in a fight with Vemmaṇa at Raṭṭahaḷḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatkaḷacuryyacakravartti vīranārāyaṇanāhavamalladēvavarṣa
da 4 neya śōbhakritu saṁvatsarada vaiśākha bahuḷa 1 Ādi
vāradandu ṟaṭṭahaḷḷiyoḷu baṁmarāvutana bammeyanammi kādi sura
lōkameydida mārgga

jitēna labhyatē lakṣmī mritēnāpi surāṁganā kṣaṇavidhvaṁsani kāyē (ti) kā cintā ma
raṇē raṇē . tanagidirāṁta vairigaḷanugraparākramadiṁde kondu bhūvanite
gadhīśanappa caladaṁkana meccisi ṟaṭṭahaḷḷiyoḷu kanakavimānamēṟi sura
lōkamaneydida mārggamaṁ jagajjanamaṟiyal māḍidudu bammana sāsa
na vīrasāsana . caladaṁka mādiseṭṭiya maligaṁ sāvigeya baṁdu
rāvutataleyaṁ saṁ tōraṇagaṭṭuttaṁ celviṁ suralōkameydidaṁ
bammi .

birudina biṁkadaṁkada virōdhigaḷaṁ taṟi
dikki dikkaripariyantamuṁ jhasamanārjjisi vīrara
saṁ tuḷkāḍi kādidaṁ kali caladaṁkarāma vibhu mā
daṇaseṭṭiya gandhavāraṇaṁ suragaṇikāmanōnayana
vallabha vīrara vīra bammuga . vemmaṇana bamma
niṟidaḍe tummagidaṟidaṁdavāytu bhūlōkadoḷiṁ .
tammī paralōkaveyda bammana hōlale gaṁḍanāvano jagadoḷu .
Digital edition of SII 20.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
